nodes.name: 栖息地破坏
nodes.summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

nodes.name: 路易·皮埃尔·维埃约
nodes.summary: 路易·皮埃尔·维埃约是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联90种鸟类，包括草黃樹鴨、环颈鸭、赤琵嘴鴨等90种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: VU
nodes.summary: VU表示 IUCN 易危等级，当前关联694种鸟类，如丹顶鹤、索马里鸵鸟、大斑几维鸟等694种鸟类。

nodes.name: 橘黃巨嘴鳥
nodes.summary: 橘黃巨嘴鳥（Saffron toucanet，学名 Pteroglossus bailloni），在图谱中标记为易危（VU）物种，主要分布于路易·皮埃尔·维埃约、大西洋沿岸森林，主要威胁包括栖息地破坏、猎捕压力、森林砍伐。

nodes.name: 森林砍伐
nodes.summary: 原生林被砍伐导致栖息地面积和连通性下降。

nodes.name: 猎捕压力
nodes.summary: 直接猎捕或误捕造成额外死亡。

nodes.name: 大西洋沿岸森林
nodes.summary: 大西洋沿岸森林是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联52种鸟类，包括斑拟䳍、孤䳍、黑額鳴冠雉等52种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

links.key: bird-橘黃巨嘴鳥-ff99ce43__distributed_in__loc-路易-皮埃尔-维埃约-d872b74a
links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The saffron toucanet (Pteroglossus bailloni) is a species of bird in the family Ramphastidae found in the Atlantic Forest in far north-eastern Argentina, south-eastern Brazil, and eastern Paraguay

links.evidence: The saffron toucanet (Pteroglossus bailloni) is a species of bird in the family Ramphastidae found in the Atlantic Forest in far north-eastern Argentina, south-eastern Brazil, and eastern Paraguay

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: It is threatened by habitat loss, degradation, hunting, and being captured. They are currently considered Near Threatened by BirdLife International. It occurs in several protected areas, such as the Itatiaia National Park and Intervales State Park; both in south-eastern Brazil

links.label: 受威胁于

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: They are a popular choice for the illegal bird trade. They are also in danger from being hunted by humans. Due to deforestation, they are prone to local extinction in smaller forest fragments. Managers are working to reduce the loss of biodiversity with their large reserves
